title: Haunted's War Helmets
body:
Currently there is only one type of helmet and it is based on ancient rome war helmets. But I am planning on making various more in the future.



Helmets are stronger than their default counterpart EX: iron helmet has a damage resistance of 2, the iron war helmet has a resistance of 4.



Future Plans: New helmets with special abilities and powers.
